name: Mrs. Field's Double-Rich Chocolate Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. In a medium bowl, combine flour, soda, salt, and cocoa powder. Mix well and set aside.
3. In a large bowl, blend the sugars with an electric mixer at medium speed until light and fluffy.
4. Add butter and beat to form a grainy paste. Scrape down the sides of the bowl.
5. Add eggs and vanilla; beat at medium speed until light and fluffy.
6. Gradually add the flour mixture alternately with the chocolate chips, blending just until combined.
7. Drop dough by rounded tablespoons onto ungreased baking sheets, 1 1/2 inches apart.
8. Bake for 21-23 minutes. Transfer cookies to a cool surface immediately after removing from oven.
